code: import{createAsyncThunk,createSlice}from'@reduxjs/toolkit';export const fetchPosts=createAsyncThunk('posts/fetchPosts',async()=>{const response=await fetch('https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts');if(!response.ok){throw new Error('Failed to fetch posts');}return response.json();});const postsSlice=createSlice({name:'posts',initialState:{posts:[],loading:false,error:null},reducers:{},extraReducers:builder=>{builder.addCase(fetchPosts.pending,state=>{state.loading=true;state.error=null;}).addCase(fetchPosts.fulfilled,(state,action)=>{state.loading=false;state.posts=action.payload;}).addCase(fetchPosts.rejected,(state,action)=>{state.loading=false;state.error=action.error.message;});}});export default postsSlice.reducer;
